creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #0)
> upstream is still active.
> Project is now located at https://github.com/sleuthkit/autopsy/
> Latest release: 4.19.3 (Dec 23, 2021)
I don't understand why deprecation is being requested rather than the update.  We typically do not deprecate non-broken maintained ports.
